capabilities.description: The capabilities allowed in the CloudFormation stack, such as CAPABILITY_IAM or CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM, which are necessary for creating resources with specific permissions.

description.description: A brief explanation or summary of the CloudFormation stack's purpose or functionality.

disable_rollback.description: Indicates whether the stack should disable rollback if the creation fails, meaning it will keep the resources created up to the failure point.

iam_role_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that CloudFormation assumes to create the stack.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the CloudFormation stack.

notification_arns.description: The ARNs of SNS topics to which CloudFormation sends notifications about stack events.

outputs.description: The output values defined in the CloudFormation stack, which may be used as inputs for other stacks or services.

parameters.description: The key-value pairs specified in the stack that define input parameters for the CloudFormation template.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs used to organize, track, or control access to the CloudFormation stack.

template_body.description: The content of the CloudFormation template used to create the stack, written in JSON or YAML format.

timeout_in_minutes.description: The maximum amount of time, in minutes, that CloudFormation should take to create the stack before timing out.
